title: Craftable God Apple
description: Adds the removed recipe of the Enchanted golden apple
body:
# What does it add?
It adds the old removed recipe of the Enchanted Golden Apple

# Why would you need to download this mod
To get the old recipe to craft the enchanted golden apple back

# Critical Info
## Recipe

## Other
Does this add anything else: No
